LanguageData.UB_SNS_NSFWnArtist.title: Porn artist
LanguageData.UB_SNS_NSFWnArtist.description: After graduating art school, [PAWN_nameDef] attempted to get noticed in [PAWN_possessive] local art sphere. The only ones that really gained any traction was [PAWN_possessive] risqué pieces, which [PAWN_pronoun] published anonymously. [PAWN_nameDef] begrudgingly adopted a fictional artist name and produced pornographic art for money, a profession they hid from their public life.
